task.inventory_reason: The article/preprint describes a meta-analysis of independent replication studies registered on OSF and points to open data/code, including an OSF project and dataset. It may be a reusable source object, but its rows need inventory because only a subset appear to contain comparable original and replication effect sizes.
task.next_action: Keep as a source-family candidate and inventory OSF project 9r62x plus dataset sfdq4/code scripts; route only confirmed original/replication effect-size rows to result-table extraction.
task.preferred_source_family_name: Successes and Failures of Replications based on OSF Registries
